{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207475381A9C0186590BAD43963"}"},"total":3035},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7288254109399941903","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这可能是我看过写80.90年代最好的一本书了。写的真是行云流水，文笔清晰，思路敏捷。。看的我是爱不释手啊！重要的主线剧情会很细心的讲解，证明作者很有功底，不重要的一笔带过。。就是写的太少了，，，已经收藏，加油写啊！！","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":11,"text":"90年代","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=90%E5%B9%B4%E4%BB%A3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774136873BAD43963%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227288254109399941903%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227276619121939205182%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%2290%E5%B9%B4%E4%BB%A3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696930918,"group_id":"7276619121939205182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8NR54AX/feQxPosrIfhAVQyxre00SFflR2oxis0mN5g","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0a8f755157244a138232acb745f885db~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702378&x-signature=i6WgLVcgOjPrSK%2FNwjm30VEarIw%3D","user_id":"1626933328621680","user_name":"平淡0人生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1626933328621680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276619121939205182","book_info":{"abstract":"从2035重生到黄金年代1989，华夏顶级芯片专家徐华盛带着满脑子科技知识站在风口浪尖上，发誓这辈子不再憋屈。
　从VCD产业开始，家电，传呼机，手机，芯片，光刻机，互联网，汽车，无人机，新能源，医疗器械，火箭，卫星，从自家电子厂开始，徐华盛开始打造属于自己的科技帝国，助力华夏重回世界巅。峰。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/138cccd0b67277a2d74c7e4d9c8383f1","author":"千海观音","author_id":"","book_id":"7276619121939205182","book_name":"重生1989：从小厂到军工巨头","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7276619257830457918","read_count":"97657","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3273674"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1671","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/67140f462decd796a866d39353952b32~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320873&x-signature=pwjsNj8nRS4rYxUmspmmMiLL8eA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"86937804589","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.4511606e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207475381A9C0186590BAD43963"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":40,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14511,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":55664},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7284466271390106426","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_d
